title: YOUTH TRANSITIONAL LIVING PROGRAM - 211info
text: YOUTH OUTREACH SERVICES YOUTH TRANSITIONAL LIVING PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides group apartment living. Clients will have access to employment services, education services, and life skills classes. 719 E 1st Street Newberg, OR 97132 Eligibility: Ages 16-21 who are experiencing homelessness Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-6pm (503) 538-8023 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 538-8023 Main phone (503) 550-9638 After-hours call or text Main phone (503) 538-8023 Isabella Norman [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call to begin eligibility determination process. All placements are made on a case-by-case basis. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Yamhill County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-8pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Next to Domino's Pizza downtown Services: Case/Care Management * Homeless Youth Transitional Housing/Shelter * Homeless Youth Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY FACILITIES/CENTERS - YOUTH OUTREACH DROP-IN CENTER EMPLOYMENT - JOBS READINESS PROGRAM HOUSING/SHELTER - SAFE SHELTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. YOUTH OUTREACH SERVICES
